channel.title: ARC Informatique — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by ARC Informatique (arcinfo).

item.title: CVE-2026-1698 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — HTTP Host header vulnerability in WebClient and WebScheduler web apps
item.description: A HTTP Host header attack vulnerability affects WebClient and the WebScheduler web apps of PcVue in version 15.0.0 through 16.3.3 included, allowing a remote attacker to inject harmful payloads that manipulate server-side behavior. This vulnerability…

item.title: CVE-2026-1697 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Use of unsecure cookies for GraphicalData web service and WebClient web app
item.description: The Secure and SameSite attribute are missing in the GraphicalData web services and WebClient web app of PcVue in version 12.0.0 through 16.3.3 included.

item.title: CVE-2026-1696 · 2.3 LOW 🌩️ — Missing security HTTP headers
item.description: Some HTTP security headers are not properly set by the web server when sending responses to the client application.

item.title: CVE-2026-1695 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — XSS vulnerability upon unsuccessful authentication
item.description: An XSS vulnerability affects the OAuth web services used by the WebVue, WebScheduler, TouchVue and SnapVue features of PcVue in version 12.0.0 through 16.3.3 included. It might allow a remote attacker to trick a legitimate user into loading content f…

item.title: CVE-2026-1694 · 2.3 LOW 🌩️ — Server configuration details in HTTP headers
item.description: HTTP headers are added by the default configuration of IIS and ASP.net, and are not removed at the deployment phase of the webservices used by the WebVue, WebScheduler, TouchVue and SnapVue features of PcVue in version 12.0.0 through 16.3.3 included.…

item.title: CVE-2026-1693 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Use of vulnerable Resource Owner Password Credentials flow
item.description: The OAuth grant type Resource Owner Password Credentials (ROPC) flow is still used by the werbservices used by the WebVue, WebScheduler, TouchVue and Snapvue features of PcVue in version 12.0.0 through 16.3.3 included despite being deprecated. It mig…

item.title: CVE-2026-1692 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Missing origin validation in GraphicalData web service requests
item.description: A missing origin validation in WebSockets vulnerability affects the GraphicalData web services used by the WebVue, WebScheduler, TouchVue and SnapVue features of PcVue in version 12.0.0 through 16.3.3 included. It might allow a remote attacker to lur…

item.title: CVE-2025-9999 · 7.6 HIGH — Improper validation of payload elements
item.description: Some payload elements of the messages sent between two stations in a networking architecture are not properly checked on the receiving station allowing an attacker to execute unauthorized commands in the application.

item.title: CVE-2025-9998 · 6 MEDIUM — Improper validation of packets sequencing
item.description: The sequence of packets received by a Networking server are not correctly checked. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability to send specially crafted messages to force the application to stop.

item.title: CVE-2025-4384 · 6 MEDIUM — Certificate validity not properly verified
item.description: The MQTT add-on of PcVue fails to verify that a remote device’s certificate has not already expired or has not yet become valid. This allows malicious devices to present certificates that are not rejected properly. The use of a client certificate red…

item.title: CVE-2024-12057 · 1.8 LOW — User credentials recorded in log files
item.description: User credentials (login & password) are inserted into log files when a user tries to authenticate using a version of a Web client that is not compatible with that of the PcVue Web back end. By exploiting this vulnerability, an attacker could retrieve…

item.title: CVE-2024-12056 · 2.3 LOW 🌩️ — Client Secret not checked with OAuth Password grant type
item.description: The Client secret is not checked when using the OAuth Password grant type. By exploiting this vulnerability, an attacker could connect to a web server using a client application not explicitly authorized as part of the OAuth deployment. Exploitation…
